hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import json, sys, os
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
path = data.get('tool_input', {}).get('file_path', '')
protected = ['clinical_trials.db', 'seed.ts']
if any(p in path for p in protected):
    print(json.dumps({'decision': 'block', 'reason': f'Protected file: {path}. Modify only with explicit instruction.'}))
else:
    print(json.dumps({'decision': 'approve'}))
"
